title: Flight Academy design tokens
description: Source-of-truth schema for apps/web-ui/tokens/tokens.json per ADR-014 §C. Top-level keys are token categories (kebab-case ASCII); the values inside each category are token definitions with a required `value` and an optional `tenantOverride` flag. The schema is hand-curated rather than generated so that `$schema` references in tokens.json give IDE autocomplete + on-save validation without a build step.

$schema.description: Pointer to this schema. Lets editors validate the file as you type.

$comment.description: Free-form note for human readers. Ignored by the emitter.

^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$.description: A token category. Becomes the prefix of every emitted CSS custom property (e.g. `color` → `--color-...`).

^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*$.description: Intentionally permits purely numeric keys: the `shadow` category uses `1`/`2`/`3` so the emitted CSS custom properties read as `--shadow-1`. Categories whose elevation order is semantic (rather than named) use this shape.

tokenDef.description: A single design token. `value` is the literal CSS value the emitter writes; `tenantOverride: true` marks tokens that runtime tenant settings may replace per ADR-014 §F (the emitter still writes the fallback to tokens.css; the runtime overrides at boot).

value.description: CSS value as it will appear in tokens.css. Examples: `oklch(0.42 0.16 265)`, `4px`, `0 2px 8px rgba(20, 25, 40, 0.06)`.

tenantOverride.description: True if this token is part of the white-label override surface. The emitter ignores this flag; the runtime layer reads it.
